targets.expr: internal_tag: "nginx" | stats by(status) count() as requests
internal_tag: "nginx" | stats by (host) sum(body_bytes_sent) as TotalBytes
internal_tag: "nginx" | extract '<method> <uri> <protocol>' from _msg | format "<method> <uri> with HTTP status: <status> From <remote_addr>"
internal_tag: "nginx" | top 11 by (remote_addr) hits as Requests
internal_tag: "nginx" | top 11 by (server_name) hits as Total
internal_tag: "nginx" | extract '<_> <Page> <_>' from _msg | top 11 by (Page) hits as Total
